title: Global Business Analyst & Admin (Marketing & Data Cloud) - Salesforce (m/f/d)
required_skills: 5+ years in Life Sciences or regulated industry
University degree in business administration or economics
matched_skills: Agile project management (Scrum, SAFe) — supports user story / epic translation
Sales demo and user training — supports workshop/training responsibilities
missing_skills: Life Sciences or regulated industry experience (5+ years) — critical gap
Dedicated Salesforce BA/Admin role experience (3+ years) — critical gap
Salesforce BA / Marketing Cloud / Data Cloud certifications
core_responsibilities: Configure and validate Salesforce Marketing Cloud and Data Cloud; collaborate with IT for scalable solution design
Define and refine customer engagement processes; translate requirements into epics, features, and user stories
Support country workshops, localization, training, and hypercare to ensure adoption
Maintain data quality and reporting foundations to support analytics and KPI tracking
Support OneCRM initiative design, configuration, and rollout across global regions
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Salesforce as a hands-on tool (if any configuration or admin tasks were performed at prior roles)
Emphasize Jira/Confluence usage in Agile delivery context
Stress KPI reporting and data quality work (Power BI, customer data analysis at Hapag-Lloyd)
Position Agile (Scrum/SAFe) experience as directly relevant to epics/user story authoring
Underscore cross-functional stakeholder management across Sales, Marketing, IT (HSBC programme, Hapag-Lloyd)
